category_sources: Official GitHub README describes masscan as an Internet-scale port scanner; source_facts.description says TCP port scanner.
display_name_sources: Official README heading uses MASSCAN; source_facts.name is masscan.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage, configuration, banner checking, output formats, performance, and build instructions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/robertdavidgraham/masscan, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes Internet-scale TCP port scanning, nmap-like usage, banner checking, and CLI options; source_facts.executables lists masscan.
